# Project configuration

[Download JSON Schema](/docs/schemas/project.schema.json)

## Example

```yaml
apiVersion: libredash.dev/v1
kind: Project
metadata:
  name: movielens-experiment
spec:
  connections:
    include:
      - connections/*.yaml
  sources:
    include:
      - sources/*.yaml
  workspaces:
    include:
      - workspaces/*/workspace.yaml
```
